# RustyNES v2.1.0 — "Fathom"

**The accuracy-remediation release — and the first of the new "Fathom" line.** After the v2.0.x "Harbor" mobile-finalization train, v2.1.0 is a **core / desktop** cut that closes out the standing accuracy-gap audit: a hardware-correct PPU display fix, a mapper-coverage completion that nearly triples the oracle-gated tier, the formal closure of the last open accuracy residual, and a full disposition of every ignored test. It lands **ahead of** the joint mobile store launch — which has moved from v2.1.0 to **v2.2.0**, so the Android + iOS apps re-release on this improved core.

The deterministic core is unchanged except one **display-only** PPU fix, so **AccuracyCoin holds 141/141 (100.00%, RAM-authoritative)**, nestest is 0-diff, the `#![no_std]` chip stack is untouched, and there is **no save-state / movie format bump**.

---

## PPU palette backdrop-override (F1.1)

When rendering is disabled and the VRAM address `v` points into palette space (`$3F00-$3FFF`), the 2C02's palette RAM is addressed by `v`, so the pixel output is the color at `v & 0x1F` — **not** the universal backdrop (`$3F00`). RustyNES now models this (with the `$10/$14/$18/$1C → $00` universal-backdrop mirroring), **byte-exact with TriCNES** (`Emulator.cs`), the AccuracyCoin author's own reference emulator.

- It is a **display artifact only** — palette RAM is never mutated, and rendering-enabled output is unchanged.
- The classic `full_palette` / `flowing_palette` demos — which display all 64 colors at once, physically impossible without this trick — now render correctly.
- **9 snapshots re-blessed**: the 2 palette demos + **7 commercial games** (Micro Machines-style palette effects). Every one converges RustyNES **with** its TriCNES oracle; `external_real_games` (the 60-ROM byte-identity oracle) stays **60/60 byte-identical**.

## PPU OAM + open-bus audits (F1.2 / F1.3)

The OAMADDR-forced-to-0 window (dots 257-320), the `$2004` `$E3` attribute-byte mask, and the PPU open-bus **refresh map** were audited against the Blargg `ppu_open_bus` table + AccuracyCoin and found **already correct** — each is now locked by a fast unit regression test (previously only the ~57 s ROM battery guarded them). The `OAMADDR & 0xF8` render-start OAM copy stays **unmodeled by design**: Mesen2, ares, and TriCNES all deliberately omit this revision-dependent, oracle-less corner.

## Mapper completion — 88 promotions, oracle-gated 60 → 148 (F3)

**86 families were promoted BestEffort → Curated**, each backed by a real commercial-ROM boot-snapshot oracle (ROM SHA + framebuffer/audio FNV + cycle count; ROMs never committed):

- **57** from dumps already staged in `tests/roms/external/`.
- **29** newly sourced from **GoodNES v3.23b** (all clean `[!]` dumps) — FK23C (176), Dragon Ball Z VRC4 (253), Age of Empires Waixing (245), the JY Company ASIC family (35/90/209/211), the Sachen 8259 A/B/C set (141/138/139), and more.

The tier split is now **51 Core + 95 Curated + 26 BestEffort = 172**, taking **oracle-gated coverage from 60 → 146 of 172 families**. The 26 that remain BestEffort have **no cleanly-booting dump** — the 16 NES 2.0 high-id boards (GoodNES v3.23b's iNES-1.0 headers cannot encode them), 8 boards with no matching cart, and 2 boards (50, 111) whose only available dump jams at boot — and stay register-decode + save-state unit-tested only. The ADR 0011 honesty invariant (no BestEffort mapper backs an oracle ROM) holds throughout.

## MMC3 R1/R2 scanline-IRQ residual — CLOSED (ADR 0002 F5.0)

The last open accuracy residual is now **closed by-design-permanent**, not deferred. An instrumentation-first review of the two dedicated 2026-07-02 campaign audits established that the residual is a **differential 1-dot deficit** that is structurally invariant to every global phase lever (the sprite-fetch emission-dot shift and the catch-up-boundary fencepost were both falsified there, joining 15+ prior levers), that the `gap >= 3` filter threshold is provably not the discriminator, and that the two surviving candidates would require a scheduler-substrate change that risks the sacred AccuracyCoin 141/141 for a bracket with **zero production-ROM impact**. The four `#[ignore]`'d pins stay with their fail-loud companions.

All **20** `#[ignore]`'d tests are now catalogued with dispositions in the new **`docs/accuracy-ledger.md`** — the 7 permanent pre-master-clock historical pins (superseded; real coverage is AccuracyCoin 100% / `cpu_interrupts_v2` 5/5 / `visual_regression` 7/7), the 1 NEC-rev-B MMC3 sub-ROM (only one of two opposite silicon revisions can pass), the 5 fixture-limited Vs. DualSystem GVS boots, the 2 live-network probes, and the 1 copyrighted-HD-pack test. **None is an accuracy gap.**

## Doc reconciliation (F0)

`docs/mappers.md` + `docs/compatibility.md` were corrected — MMC5 vertical split-screen + audio and the Vs. `DualSystem` core are **implemented**, not deferred (the docs had gone stale). The new **`docs/accuracy-ledger.md`** maps every documented approximation to its disposition: remediated / no-stricter-oracle / deferred / out-of-scope.

## Verification

- **AccuracyCoin 141/141 (100.00%)**, nestest 0-diff, `cpu_interrupts_v2` 5/5, `ppu_sprites` 19/19, mmc3 A12-IRQ 18/18.
- **60-ROM commercial byte-identity oracle 60/60** (`external_real_games`); the extended oracle is **138/138** (52 original + 86 promoted).
- Mapper honesty gate green (headless + local commercial); tier invariants 8/8.
- fmt / clippy (all feature combos) / `RUSTDOCFLAGS=-D warnings cargo doc` / `thumbv7em-none-eabihf` no_std cross-compile / both wasm32 clippy legs / markdownlint all clean.

## Dependencies

No workspace dependency changes. Version bump: workspace `2.0.8 → 2.1.0`. Mobile `MARKETING_VERSION`s are unchanged — the Android + iOS apps re-release at **v2.2.0**.

---

## What's next

- **v2.1.1+** — the rest of the Fathom accuracy line (frontend DualSystem second-screen presentation, generated NTSC palette, NSF non-60 Hz / NSFe).
- **v2.2.0** — the **joint Google Play + Apple App Store + AltStore PAL + F-Droid launch**, on this improved core.
